title: A Love Story by the Sea
content: Every summer, Julia escaped the busy city to spend a few quiet weeks in a small coastal village. One morning she met Alex while watching fishermen return with their boats at sunrise. They began exploring the town together, discovering hidden beaches, family restaurants, and peaceful walking trails along the cliffs. Neither wanted the vacation to end, but instead of treating it as a temporary romance, they made plans to keep seeing each other after returning home. The sea had introduced them, but it was their shared curiosity about life that convinced them to continue writing their story together.
